user_query: @employees/emp_006 what is the remote work policy?
final_answer_preview:
Remote Work Policy (Remote work policy page: Remote Work Policy 2025)

Key points:
- Hybrid-first work model: Employees may work remotely up to 3 days per week.
- Home office budget: €500 one-time, plus €100/year recurring for equipment.
- In-office anchor days: Tuesday and Thursday (mandatory in-office days for teams to coordinate).
- International remote work: Allowed up to 30 days per year with
